content_body: First Impression... WOW!! Your amazing cabin is straight out of my imagination. This gave my hubby the dream home that I have been trying to explain for years. We just bought land here and will break ground in hopefully a year. Now we will have the perfect home! We will be returning here in the future. This was a birthday surprise for our youngest. He loves to fish and Blue Ridge is amazing. He caught a 2.75 lb trout. This has been the biggest blessing! Thank you! ~ The Longs
title: Straight Out Of My Imagination!
